titleStmt.title: SII 18.349: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 349. (B.K. No. 84 of 1933-34.) GUḌADĀNVĒRI, RANEBENNUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Beam on the top of the second entrance into the central shrine of the Kallēs11vara temple.

summary.p: This inscription is dated in Śaka 1104, Śubhakṛit, Mārgaśira śu. Pūrṇimā, Thursday lunar eclipse. In the cyclic year given, there was no eclipse in the month of Mārgaśira. But in the next year i.e., Śōbhakṛit (Śaka 1105), there was a lunar eclipse on the given tithi and day. The details in the latter year correspond to A.D. 1183, December 1, Thursday. This apparently is the date intended.

It records three grants made by three persons to god Mallikārjunadēva of Alūr and god Yōgēśvaradēva of Brahmapuri. The first was made at the instance of Daṇḍanāyaka Mallugidēva by Suṁkavergaḍe Nāgarasa and his younger brother Dāvarasa, from the nelevīḍu of Hāvari. The second one was made by Suṁkavergaḍe Sōvarasa, at the instance of Mahāmaṇḍales11vara Jōyidēvarasa. The donors of the third were Lāḷakhaṇḍeyakārar-adhishṭhāyaka Vāsudēva-Daṇḍanāyaka and his brothers Kēsava-Daṇḍanāyaka and Nāraṇa-Daṇḍanāyaka. Vāsudēva-Daṇḍanāyaka held many other offices.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti śrī matu sakavaruśa 1104 neya śubhakritusaṁvatsarada mārggasira śudda saurnnamāsye brihaspativāra sōmagrahaṇa vuttarāyaṇasaṁkramaṇa byatī pāteṁ koḍi baṁda mahāpuṇyatithiyalli śrīmanmahāpra
caṁḍadaṁḍanāyakaṁ mallugidēvarasara besadiṁ banavasepaṁnirccāsirada suṁkavergga ḍe nāgarasaruṁ tadanūjarappa ḍāvarasanuṁ hāvariya nelavīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkatā vinōdadiṁdoṁdāgirddu Ālūra śrīmallikā
rjjunadēvarggaṁ brahmapuriya śrīyōgēśvaradēvarggaṁ Alliya yeḷḷu hattimaḷave davasaṭhāṇōga gāṇa Eraḍu yeleyokkaleraḍu yiṁtinitumaṁ samabhāgavāgi dēvara Aṁgabhōgakkaṁ naṁdādīvigegaṁ sarvvabādhaparihā
ravāgi hejjuṁkavanu biṭṭaru . © svasti samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷē svaraṁ jōyidēvarasara besadiṁ beḷuhugeyeppattu hoṁnavatti haṁneraḍu bidira haḷḷihaṁneraḍu biṁnnavura haṁnneraḍu sattaḷigeyeppattu yiṁtinita
ra suṁkavarggaḍe sōvarasanu Alūra śrīmallikārjjunadēvarggaṁ brahmapuriya yōgēśvaradēvarggaṁ Alliya yeḷḷu hattiya maḷuve davasa jīvadhana bhaṁḍiya totti na gāṇavoṁdu yeleya vokkaloṁdu [Iṁti]nitaṟa pū
rvvamariyādeyalu naḍava maṁnneyada suṁkavaṁ dēvara Aṁgabhōgakkaṁ naṁdādīvi gegaṁ sarvvabādheparihāravāgi biṭṭaru . © svasti samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahā pradhānaṁ sarvvādhikāri śrīkaraṇaṁ sēnādhipati
bāhattaraniyōgādhipati lāḷakhaṁḍayakāṟaradhiṣṭāyikaṁ mahāpracaṁḍa vāsudēvadaṁḍanāyakaruṁ tadanūja rappa kēsavadaṁḍanāyakaruṁ nāraṇadaṁḍa nāyakaruṁ sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁdoṁdāgirddu Ālūra śrīmallikārjjuna
dēvarggaṁ brahmapuriya yōgēsvaradēvarggaṁ Alliya maduve sōbhanakke koṭṭa lavu kikada hoṁge haṇavoṁdu hasuvaṁdara haṇavoṁdu Avaṟa baḷiya Akki tuppa pāri khāya vuroḷage māṟida bhaṁḍa(ṁ)kke hoṁge hāgavoṁdu vīsavoṁdu tippe
suṁka yiṁtinitumaṁ dēvaraṁgabhōgakkaṁ naṁdādīvigegaṁ sarvvanamasyavāgi biṭṭaru . © svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vāyō harēti vasuṁdharātu ṣaṣṭirvvaruśasahaśrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . kōṭipayaṁkavileyanekkōṭi ta
pōdhanara vēdavidaraṁ haṁnnirkkōṭiyanekkōṭi tīrtthadi kōṭimahādinadoḷaḷida niṁtidanaḷidanu .
Digital edition of SII 18.349 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
